_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for Datasets / Review Articles / Pipelines. Edit one file, commit. CI validates JSON; pages render + search client-side, with a no-JS fallback list.

datasets.title: Genomics Data
datasets.desc: Genome-scale resources for method development in oncology and population genetics.

datasets.title: Medical Imaging Data
datasets.desc: Brain and medical imaging datasets for preprocessing and analysis pipelines.

datasets.title: Microbiome & Metagenomics
datasets.desc: Microbiome and metagenomic collections for community and gut–brain studies.

datasets.title: EHR Data
datasets.desc: Electronic Health Record data for real-world evidence and predictive modeling.

datasets.title: Clinical Trial Data
datasets.desc: Clinical-trial datasets to support causal inference and trial methodology.

datasets.title: Biobank Data
datasets.desc: Large-scale biobank resources such as UK Biobank–style population cohorts.

datasets.title: Spatial Transcriptomics
datasets.desc: Spatially resolved transcriptomics datasets for tissue-level analysis.

datasets.title: Proteomics Data
datasets.desc: Proteomic and proteogenomic resources linking protein and genomic layers.

datasets.title: Bioinformatics Data
datasets.desc: General-purpose bioinformatics datasets and tooling references.

articles.title: Cancer Research
articles.desc: Key discoveries in cancer genomes over 15 years, plus PCAWG, TCGA and single-cell cancer databases.

articles.title: Electronic Health Records
articles.desc: Papers, books and repositories on EHR — from real-world-evidence data prep to advanced statistical/ML analysis.

articles.title: Genetics
articles.desc: GWAS, rare-variant analysis, polygenic risk scores and genomics–proteomics integration.

articles.title: Medical Imaging
articles.desc: Reviews on medical-imaging preprocessing methods and practical neuroscientific applications.

articles.title: Microbiome & Metagenomics
articles.desc: Microbiota–gut–brain axis, the microbiome in aging and cancer, metagenomics for personalized medicine.

articles.title: Large Language Models
articles.desc: Techniques & architectures, surveys, trustworthy-LLM design and LLM-empowered statistical analysis.

articles.title: AI Safety & Trustworthiness
articles.desc: Algorithmic fairness & bias, privacy & differential privacy, aligning AI with human values.

articles.title: AGI & AI Agents
articles.desc: The frontier of AGI and AI agents — a foundational entry point for statisticians new to the field.

pipelines.title: EHR Data Pipelines
pipelines.desc: Pipelines for processing Electronic Health Record data, from ingestion to analysis-ready datasets.

pipelines.title: Neuroimaging Processing Software
pipelines.desc: Key neuroimaging tools widely used in neuroscience research, with corresponding publications.

pipelines.title: Data Fusion Analysis Pipeline
pipelines.desc: A modular framework integrating diverse data sources and analytical models.

pipelines.title: Clinical Trials Data Processing
pipelines.desc: Efficient pipelines for processing and analyzing clinical-trial data.
